invariant: BF1 — never overwrite a frozen artifact; a change is a new version + change request
seed: run VERIFY (baseline immutability check) against .aprd/aprd.lock (status frozen; v2 lock supersedes.v1.content_sha256 f3a1c0...)
load_bearing_assertion: Verifier detects the frozen baseline aprd.frozen.md was modified (the tag feature jammed into v1 instead of aprd.v2). Verdict 'rejected'/'immutability-breach'. Golden keeps aprd.frozen.md byte-unchanged and puts all new IDs in aprd.v2.frozen.md.

expected_signal.basis: .aprd/aprd.lock status:frozen + v2 supersedes.v1 sha — baseline body must not change; change requires a new version

separates_from_golden_by: baseline_immutability.frozen_artifacts_modified (empty in golden / [aprd.frozen.md] here) — the BF1 invariant.
